name: sjrcw-load-test
description: 圣举人才网在线考试系统 — 压测工具套件

scripts.monitor: node -e "const m = require('./monitor'); const s = m.startContinuousMonitor(2000, m.printSnapshot); process.on('SIGINT', () => { s.stop(); console.log('Peak:', s.getPeak()); process.exit(0); }); console.log('监控中，按 Ctrl+C 停止...');"
scripts.health: node -e "const axios = require('axios'); const { config } = require('./config'); axios.get(config.BASE_URL + '/api/v1/health').then(r => console.log('OK', r.status)).catch(e => console.error('FAIL', e.message));"
